noticias.titulo: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on argenx, Raises Price Target to $1088
noticias.resumen: B of A Securities  analyst Tazeen Ahmad   maintains argenx (NASDAQ:ARGX) with a Buy and raises the price target from $1016 to $1088.

noticias.titulo: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) Wins FDA Approval To Treat Two Year Olds With CASGEVY
noticias.resumen: FDA approved expanded use of CASGEVY for children as young as two years with sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia. The approval makes CASGEVY the first gene therapy of its kind available to this pediatric group in the U.S. Vertex Pharmaceuticals estimates that roughly 5,500

noticias.titulo: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Vertex (VRTX): Should You Buy?
noticias.resumen: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Vertex (VRTX). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

noticias.titulo: Arcutis vs. Vertex: Which Pharmaceutical Maker Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
noticias.resumen: Arcutis doubled revenue last year while Vertex delivered strong profits and cash flow. Explore how each company stacks up on growth, risk, and value.

noticias.titulo: CRSP, VRTX Stocks Surge As FDA Clears Casgevy For Children Ages 2 And Up
noticias.resumen: The fresh FDA approval allows the use of the cell therapy in patients as young as two years old with sickle cell disease (SCD) who have recurrent vaso-occlusive crises or transfusion-dependent beta thalassemia (TDT).

noticias.titulo: Vertex Gets FDA Nod for Expanded Use of Casgevy in SCD & TDT
noticias.resumen: VRTX gets FDA approval to expand Casgevy use in patients aged two and older with SCD or TDT, a first for genetic therapies in both inherited blood disorders.

noticias.titulo: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:ALNY): An Affordable Growth Stock with Explosive Momentum and a Reasonable Price
noticias.resumen: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals (ALNY) combines explosive earnings growth with a reasonable valuation, fitting the Affordable Growth (GARP) strategy perfectly for balanced upside.
